profile.name: Arthur Hammond Aragão Poggy
profile.summary: Bilingual Computer Science student (PUC-Rio) with native Brazilian Portuguese and fluent English, and hands-on experience evaluating LLM outputs, designing prompts, and validating AI-generated content across medical, legal, and research contexts. Strong analytical and writing skills with deep familiarity with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini.

descriptions: Developed and refined prompts in Portuguese and English for LLM pipelines processing medical documents — ensuring accuracy, fluency, and contextual relevance of AI-generated outputs
Evaluated model responses for semantic correctness and cultural alignment, iterating on prompt design to reduce hallucinations and improve output reliability
Documented prompt strategies, evaluation criteria, and quality standards for team-wide consistency
Designed and validated Portuguese-language prompts for Google Gemini agent generating legal defense documents — assessing outputs against source judicial records for accuracy and cultural correctness
Built evaluation scripts to audit AI-generated content quality, comparing model outputs against expected results and defining rubrics for consistent assessment
Reviewed and edited academic manuscripts in Portuguese and English, assessing linguistic quality, coherence, and contextual accuracy
Provided structured written feedback aligned with publication standards — developing strong analytical and critical writing skills in both languages

educations.school: Pontifícia Universidade Católica do Rio de Janeiro — PUC-Rio

descriptions: Languages: Portuguese (native, Brazil), English (fluent — written and verbal)
LLM & AI: Prompt design, output evaluation, rubric creation, hallucination mitigation, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini
Writing & Editorial: Academic manuscript review, structured feedback, content quality assessment, bilingual writing
Tools: Python, Git, Google Workspace, remote collaboration platforms
